# Browser game build (generated)

This folder is filled by the Godot web export script:

```bash
./scripts/build/export-web.sh
```

**Do not edit these files by hand.** Re-run the script after game changes.

If this folder is empty, `/play` will show a loading state until you export.

**Deploying to Vercel:** Run the export script locally, then commit these generated files before pushing. Vercel only builds the React app — it cannot run Godot.
